tags.tagLine: $10 OFF and $3.99 service fee waiver ($60 min. spend)! Apply vouchers at checkout

metaData.Key Information: ZENXIN Organic Baby Kailan is just like the regular Kai Lans except that they are harvested earlier, lending themselves a smaller stem length and a much less fibrous texture. They have high levels of vitamin C and A, providing the antioxidants that we need on a daily basis. They are sweet and crunchy, best prepared through stir frying.
metaData.Preparation: To prepare Organic Baby Kailan, rinse thoroughly under cold water to remove any dirt. Trim the ends if needed, and keep the leaves whole or chop to your desired size. For a quick and flavorful side, stir-fry with garlic or steam until tender. Add to soups or stir-fries for a fresh, nutritious addition to your meal.
metaData.Storage Information: Keep the vegetables at 5-7C, recommend to finish within 3 days
